statement: The EEA Agreement provides EFTA states with formal channels to influence EU legislation before adoption, commonly called 'decision-shaping' (as opposed to decision-making, which is reserved for EU members). Article 99 requires the European Commission to 'informally seek advice from experts of the EFTA States in the same way as it seeks advice from experts of the EU Member States' when preparing new legislation. Article 100 requires the Commission to 'ensure experts of the EFTA States are involved' on an equal footing in its expert groups and committees. Article 102 governs the EEA Joint Committee's incorporation of new EU legislation into the EEA Agreement, with a 6-month deadline. If an EFTA state objects to incorporation (invoking the Article 102 'right of reservation'), the relevant part of the EEA annex is suspended โ creating a 'guillotine' effect that can suspend related provisions. In practice, Norway has invoked Article 102 reservations on several occasions, including on the Third Postal Directive and the AIFM Directive, though most were eventually resolved. A 2012 Norwegian government white paper (NOU 2012:2, 'Utenfor og innenfor') concluded that Norway had formally participated in approximately 500 Commission expert groups (EFTA states participate in 323 of 360 entitled committees) but that influence on final legislation was 'limited' because EEA EFTA states have no vote in the Council or European Parliament where laws are actually decided.
statement_is: EES-samningurinn veitir EFTA-rรญkjum formlega aรฐild aรฐ sรฉrfrรฆรฐinganefndum framkvรฆmdastjรณrnar ESB (greinar 99โ102) รพar sem รพau geta mรณtaรฐ lรถggjรถf รกรฐur en hรบn er samรพykkt en รพau hafa hvorki atkvรฆรฐisrรฉtt รญ rรกรฐherrarรกรฐinu nรฉ Evrรณpuรพinginu. Norsk rรญkisstjรณrnargreinargerรฐ frรก 2012 (NOU 2012:2 ยซUtenfor og innenforยป) komst aรฐ รพeirri niรฐurstรถรฐu aรฐ Noregur hefur รพรกtttรถku รญ um 500 sรฉrfrรฆรฐingahรณpum framkvรฆmdastjรณrnarinnar en รกhrif รก lokaniรฐurstรถรฐur lรถggjafar eru ยซtakmรถrkuรฐยป.
source_name: EEA Agreement, Articles 99โ102; NOU 2012:2 'Utenfor og innenfor'
source_description_is: EES-samningurinn, grein 99โ102, og norsk rรญkisstjรณrnargreinargerรฐ NOU 2012:2 um stรถรฐu Noregs utan ESB en innan EES.
caveats: Deilur eru um virkni mรณtunar รกkvarรฐana. Stuรฐningsmenn halda รพvรญ fram aรฐ snemmbรบiรฐ innlegg รก sรฉrfrรฆรฐistigi geti mรณtaรฐ lรถggjรถf รกรฐur en pรณlitรญskar afstรถรฐur festast รญ sessi. Gagnrรฝnendur (รพar รก meรฐal รญ skรฝrslunni NOU 2012:2) halda รพvรญ fram aรฐ รพaรฐ skapi โlรฝรฐrรฆรฐishallaโ โ rรญki innleiรฐi reglur sem รพau hรถfรฐu lรกgmarksรกhrif รก. Lรญtil stjรณrnsรฝslugeta รslands takmarkar enn frekar getu รพess til aรฐ taka virkan รพรกtt รญ hundruรฐum sรฉrfrรฆรฐingahรณpa. Noregur hefur margsinnis beitt fyrirvara samkvรฆmt 102. grein (meรฐal annars vegna รพriรฐju pรณsttilskipunarinnar og tilskipunar um stรฝringu sรฉrhรฆfรฐra sjรณรฐa), รพรณtt flest mรกl hafi aรฐ lokum veriรฐ leyst. รsland hefur aldrei beitt henni. Pรณlitรญski kostnaรฐurinn viรฐ aรฐ beita henni er talinn hรกr รพar sem รพaรฐ myndi virkja โfallaxarรกkvรฆรฐiรฐโ.

related_entries.statement: Samkvรฆmt EES-samningnum taka EFTA-rรญkin (รsland, Noregur og Liechtenstein) upp lรถggjรถf innri markaรฐarins en hafa engin atkvรฆรฐisrรฉttindi รญ rรกรฐherrarรกรฐi ESB nรฉ รก Evrรณpuรพinginu. รau taka รพรกtt รญ mรณtun stefnu รก sรฉrfrรฆรฐingastigi en hafa ekki รกkvarรฐanatรถkuvald.

EES-samningurinn skapar verulegan lรฝรฐrรฆรฐishalla รพar sem รsland hefur innleitt um 13.000 lagagerรฐir ESB รกn atkvรฆรฐisrรฉttar. รsland hefur aldrei beitt neitunarvaldi sรญnu samkvรฆmt 102. grein, en Noregur hefur gert รพaรฐ nokkrum sinnum (m.a. varรฐandi รพriรฐju pรณstรพjรณnustutilskipunina og AIFM-tilskipunina). Full ESB-aรฐild myndi veita atkvรฆรฐisrรฉtt รญ rรกรฐherrarรกรฐi, 6+ รพingsรฆti รญ Evrรณpuรพinginu og framkvรฆmdastjรณra.

Sameiginlega EES-nefndin, skipuรฐ fulltrรบum ESB og EFTA/EES-rรญkjanna, ber รกbyrgรฐ รก innleiรฐingu nรฝrrar ESB-lรถggjafar รญ EES-samninginn. รkvarรฐanir krefjast samhljรณรฐa samรพykkis beggja hliรฐa. Nefndin kemur saman 8โ10 sinnum รก รกri og samรพykkir nokkur hundruรฐ รกkvarรฐanir รกrlega.

citations.report_title: Af hverju aรฐ sรฆkja um Evrรณpusambandsaรฐild?

claims.claim_text: Aukin samrรฆming viรฐ Evrรณpureglur รญ kjรถlfar EES-samningsins var hagstรฆรฐ fyrir รญslensk fyrirtรฆki, samkeppni og samkeppnishรฆfni atvinnulรญfsins

citations.report_title: Davรญรฐ รรณr Bjรถrgvinsson: Vรญรฐtรฆkt samkomulag um stjรณrnarskrรกrbreytingu

claims.claim_text: ร EES-samningnum eru รพingmenn aรฐ kvarta yfir รพvรญ aรฐ รพeir sรฉu bara ยซstimpilpรบรฐarยป fyrir ESB รพegar รพeir samรพykkja reglur.

citations.report_title: Er ekki kominn tรญmi til aรฐ afskrรญmslavรฆรฐa bรกkniรฐ รญ Brussel?

claims.claim_text: Reglur ESB sem hafa veriรฐ teknar upp รก รslandi eru samรพykktar af lรฝรฐrรฆรฐislega kjรถrnum fulltrรบum.

citations.report_title: Er รพetta boรฐlegt fyrir fullvalda รพjรณรฐ?

claims.claim_text: EES-samningurinn veitir EES-rรญkjunum aรฐgang aรฐ hluta af รพriggja รพrepa lรถggjafarferli ESB.
Samkvรฆmt 99. gr. og 100. gr. EES-samningsins er Framkvรฆmdastjรณrn ESB skylt aรฐ leita rรกรฐa hjรก sรฉrfrรฆรฐingum EFTA-rรญkjanna viรฐ undirbรบning lรถggjafar, lรญkt og eigin rรญkja.
EES-rรญkin eiga aรฐgang aรฐ nefndum Framkvรฆmdastjรณrnarinnar รก undirbรบningsstigi en รกn atkvรฆรฐisrรฉttar.
EES-rรญkin geta reynt aรฐ nรก fram efnislegum aรฐlรถgunum vegna sรฉrstakra innlendra aรฐstรฆรฐna รญ upptรถkuferlinu, sbr. 102. gr. EES-samningsins.
Meรฐ auknum vรถldum Evrรณpuรพingsins รญ lรถggjafarferlinu hefur aรฐkoma EES-rรญkjanna orรฐiรฐ flรณknari og veikst nokkuรฐ frรก tilkomu EES-samningsins รกriรฐ 1992.

citations.report_title: Hvaรฐ er รญ pakkanum?

claims.claim_text: EFTA-rรญkin hafa beitt sรฉr meรฐ รกhrifum รญ undirbรบningsferlum ESB-lรถggjafar og meรฐ sameiginlegum nefndum (EFTAโEU Joint Committee).

citations.report_title: Hvaรฐ kostar mรถguleg aรฐild รslands aรฐ Evrรณpusambandinu?

claims.claim_text: รsland hefur formlegan rรฉtt til aรฐ koma aรฐ lagasetningu ESB รก undirbรบningsstigi รญ gegnum samrรกรฐskerfi EES.

citations.report_title: Nei eรฐa jรก? Af eรฐa รก?

claims.claim_text: Umrรฆรฐan um ESB-aรฐild รslands hรณfst um 1992, รพegar รslendingar voru aรฐ ljรบka samningum viรฐ aรฐildarrรญki ESB um aรฐgang aรฐ innri markaรฐinum.
Lรถg um stafrรฆna รพjรณnustu ESB (DSA) hafa veriรฐ meรฐal heitastu umrรฆรฐuefna รญ norskum stjรณrnmรกlum รก undanfรถrnum misserum.
Spurt hefur veriรฐ hvort lรถg um stafrรฆna รพjรณnustu (DSA) gรฆtu orรฐiรฐ fyrsta mรกliรฐ รพar sem Noregur beitir neitunarvaldi รญ EES.

citations.report_title: Raunveruleg svik viรฐ fullveldi รพjรณรฐarinnar

claims.claim_text: EES-samningurinn veitir รslandi ekki atkvรฆรฐarรฉtt รญ lรถggjafarvinnunni hjรก ESB.

citations.report_title: Smรกrรญki og stรณra borรฐiรฐ โ Viรฐtal viรฐ danskan Evrรณpuรพingmann

claims.claim_text: Norรฐmenn geta meรฐ EES-samningnum aรฐeins innleitt รพaรฐ sem ESB skrifar en hafa ekkert um mรกlin aรฐ segja.

Lagaleg gerรฐ EES-samningsins mรณtaรฐist af รกherslu รslands og Noregs รก aรฐ รพรกtttaka รก innri markaรฐinum fรฆli ekki รญ sรฉr aรฐ sameiginlegar stofnanir fengu vald til aรฐ hlutast til um framkvรฆmd EES-reglna innanlands รญ meira mรฆli en stjรณrnarskrรกr รพessara rรญkja heimiluรฐu.

citations.report_title: Viรฐ hรถfum ekki tekiรฐ upp 80% af reglum ESB

claims.claim_text: Norsk skรฝrsla frรก 2012 hรฉlt fram hliรฐstรฆรฐri tรถlu um hlutdeild Noregs รญ regluverki ESB, og var รพetta notaรฐ af รญslenskum ESB-sinnum.
